text: Created ticket Update policy and extract storage contract

Implemented and verified the first storage-migration slice. Updated `README.md` and `CONSTITUTION.md` so policy is truthful about DB-canonical operational state, repo-materialized main constitution/docs/spec markdown bodies, and clone-local runtime carve-outs. Added the internal package `@pi-loom/pi-storage` with `storage/contract.ts` covering spaces/projects, repositories, worktrees, repo-relative path scopes, entities, links, events, projections, clone-local runtime attachments, and backend-agnostic storage interfaces. Verified with `npx biome check README.md CONSTITUTION.md packages/pi-storage`, `npm test -- --run packages/pi-storage/__tests__/contract.test.ts`, and `npm run typecheck`.
